description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular design and a dark exterior finish. The fuselage is streamlined, featuring a pointed nose cone and a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy. The wings are sharply swept back and positioned at a mid-fuselage level, each bearing red star insignias and additional markings. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking two large jet engine exhausts. The aircraft is equipped with retractable tricycle landing gear, and its surface is predominantly smooth and glossy, with visible panel lines and access hatches. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, supersonic-capable fighter jet designed for agility and speed.
description: A sleek, dark-colored modern military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and red star insignias on the wings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the streamlined fuselage with visible landing gear doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engine exhausts, vertical stabilizers, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same streamlined features, insignias, and the angular wing design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer; H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
